questions.question: Which two sublayers live inside a single decoder transformer block?
options: Multi head causal attention and a position wise MLP, each wrapped in a residual connection
questions.explanation: Every modern decoder LLM block is attention plus MLP, each with its own residual path and its own LayerNorm.

questions.question: What is the key difference between pre-LN and post-LN at depth?
options: Pre-LN keeps the residual signal unnormalized so gradients propagate cleanly to the embedding; post-LN puts the norm after the residual add, which shrinks gradients at depth and needs warmup
questions.explanation: Pre-LN trains stably without warmup at common learning rates; post-LN is what the 2017 paper shipped and needed warmup.

questions.question: What does the causal mask in multi head attention do?
options: Sets the upper triangle of the attention logits to negative infinity so token i cannot attend to tokens at positions greater than i
Picks the longest sequence in the batch
questions.explanation: Forgetting the causal mask trains a model that can read future tokens; the mask is the only piece that enforces causality.

questions.question: Why use a fused QKV projection instead of three separate linears?
options: One linear of width 3 times d_model collapses three kernel launches and three matmuls into one, faster on every accelerator and matches the reference GPT-2 implementation
questions.explanation: Same math, fewer kernels; reference implementations of GPT-2, LLaMA, and Mistral all ship the fused projection.

questions.question: Where should dropout NOT be placed in a transformer block?
options: On the residual identity path itself, since that breaks the additive identity that lets the gradient flow at depth
questions.explanation: Dropout 应作用于注意力输出和 MLP 残差更新上，绝不能作用于残差的恒等分支。

questions.question: 为什么将因果掩码注册为缓冲区(buffer)而不是在每次前向调用时分配它？
options: 掩码仅取决于最大上下文长度，因此在构建时分配一次并每次调用时切片活跃窗口，可避免在长上下文下的分配器热点。
缓冲区仅在 GPU 上运行
缓冲区提高了数值精度
questions.explanation: 使用 register_buffer 分配一次，每次前向切片；否则掩码会变成每次调用的分配开销。
